What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person wearing a dark grey long-sleeved top and white bracelet stands beside a grey cast-iron stove labeled ESSE. The individual touches the stove surface and opens the left firebox door. Two beige cushion-like objects rest on the flat top surface near a silver stovepipe. Inside the open firebox, grey ash and charred wood debris sit on a metal grate against light brown wooden wall paneling.

canonical_answer: At 4s, a person extends their left hand over the top of the stove; at 6s, the person points a finger at the upper right section of the stove's front face; at 8s, a person's hand is touching the glass door of the stove; at 12s, the person opens the glass door of the stove on the left side.
